caption: A woman with short dark hair and glasses is speaking against a solid black background. She is wearing a light green, patterned tunic with a dark necklace. In the first frame, she has a neutral facial expression and her hands are slightly raised. In the second frame, her head is tilted slightly back and her mouth is open as she continues to speak. By the third frame, she is smiling and gesturing with her hands closer together. In the final frame, she maintains a slight smile while her hands remain in a gesturing position. A small logo containing a circular emblem and the text "NPTEL" is visible in the bottom left and bottom center of the screen throughout the sequence. A small black microphone is clipped to the front of her tunic.
